name: Safehaven
overview: Safehaven follows Jenna Frost, a fierce, complicated high school comic book artist who must fight to uncover hidden truths after horrifying visions from her drawings come to life-threatening everyone around her. John Rayburn, the mysterious new school counselor determined to save her, even if it endangers both of their lives, and unearths his own personal demons. Complicating matters is Will, a passionate young man committed to protecting Jenna, who finds herself torn between rejecting his help and her growing feelings for him.
